# Agent Capabilities ‚Äî what you can ask Agent X to do

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-agent-capabilities.ts from src/tools/audience-map.ts.
     Do not edit by hand ‚Äî run `npx tsx scripts/gen-agent-capabilities.ts` to refresh. -->

You talk to Agent X in plain language ‚Äî it picks the tool. This lists the
capabilities surfaced to main chat, grouped by area. (Deeper tools load on
demand via tool search and aren't all listed here.)

## Common things you can say

- "change the app to dark mode"
- "dream now"
- "build me a todo app"
- "remember that I prefer tabs over spaces"
- "search the web for the latest on X"
- "what do you know about my projects?"
- "open google.com and search for X"
- "spawn an agent to research X"
- "take a screenshot of my screen"
- "every morning at 8, summarize my unread email"

## Full capability reference

### Filesystem & code

- `read` ‚Äî Read a file's contents.
- `write` ‚Äî Create or overwrite a file.
- `edit` ‚Äî Make a targeted edit to a file. _e.g._ "edit index.html and change the title"
- `edit_lines`
- `multi_edit`
- `delete_file` ‚Äî Delete a file.
- `bash` ‚Äî Run a shell command. _e.g._ "run `npm test` in the project"
- `glob` ‚Äî Find files by name pattern.
- `grep` ‚Äî Search file contents.

### Web & search

- `web_fetch` ‚Äî Fetch and read a web page. _e.g._ "summarize https://example.com"
- `web_search` ‚Äî Search the web. _e.g._ "search the web for the latest on X"
- `http_request` ‚Äî Make a raw HTTP request to an API.

### App self-control

- `setting` ‚Äî Change app settings ‚Äî theme, model, provider, voice, and more. _e.g._ "change the app to dark mode"

### Tool discovery

- `tool_search` ‚Äî Discover deeper tools not loaded by default.

### Vision

- `view_image` ‚Äî Look at an image you share. _e.g._ "what's in this screenshot?"
- `send_video` ‚Äî Send/attach a video.
- `screen_capture` ‚Äî Capture the screen. _e.g._ "take a screenshot of my screen"

### Memory

- `memory_search` ‚Äî Search long-term memory. _e.g._ "what do you know about my projects?"
- `memory_save` ‚Äî Save a fact to memory. _e.g._ "remember that I prefer tabs over spaces"
- `memory_recall` ‚Äî Recall stored facts.
- `memory_get` ‚Äî Fetch a specific memory entry.
- `memory_forget` ‚Äî Mark a fact as no longer true. _e.g._ "forget that I use Coinbase"
- `memory_reflect` ‚Äî Refresh entity summaries + opinion confidence. _e.g._ "update what you know about me"
- `memory_update_profile` ‚Äî Update your user profile (name, role, preferences).
- `memory_stats` ‚Äî Show memory statistics.
- `memory_consolidate` ‚Äî Extract durable facts from recent chunks. _e.g._ "consolidate recent conversations"
- `memory_dream` ‚Äî Tidy stored facts + launch the deep agentic reflection over recent transcripts. _e.g._ "dream now"
- `memory_ingest` ‚Äî Ingest external text/history into memory.

### Operations

- `operation_start` ‚Äî Begin a long-horizon, multi-step goal. _e.g._ "start an operation to ship feature X"
- `operation_list` ‚Äî List active operations.
- `operation_status` ‚Äî Check an operation's status.
- `operation_next` ‚Äî Get the next step of an operation.
- `operation_advance` ‚Äî Advance an operation a step.

### Worker-pool observation

- `op_status` ‚Äî Check running background workers. _e.g._ "what are my background tasks doing?"
- `op_kill` ‚Äî Stop a running worker. _e.g._ "cancel that background task"
- `op_redirect` ‚Äî Redirect a running worker with new instructions.

### Autopilot

- `autopilot_start` ‚Äî Start autonomous multi-step execution. _e.g._ "turn on autopilot"
- `autopilot_stop` ‚Äî Stop autopilot.
- `autopilot_status` ‚Äî Check autopilot status.

### Self-edit

- `self_edit` ‚Äî Modify Agent X's own source via a coding agent. _e.g._ "fix a bug in your own code"

### Planning & tasks

- `enter_plan_mode` ‚Äî Enter plan mode (propose before acting). _e.g._ "let's plan this first"
- `exit_plan_mode` ‚Äî Leave plan mode and execute.
- `task_create` ‚Äî Create a task. _e.g._ "add a task to refactor the parser"
- `task_update` ‚Äî Update a task.
- `task_list` ‚Äî List tasks.
- `task_get` ‚Äî Get a task's details.

### Protocols

- `protocol_list` ‚Äî List saved protocols (reusable workflows). _e.g._ "what protocols do you have?"
- `protocol_get` ‚Äî Read a protocol.
- `protocol_search` ‚Äî Search protocols.
- `protocol_create` ‚Äî Save a reusable workflow. _e.g._ "save this as a protocol"
- `protocol_edit` ‚Äî Edit a protocol.
- `protocol_delete`
- `protocol_unarchive`
- `protocol_pin`
- `protocol_list_archived`
- `protocol_stats`
- `protocol_prune`
- `protocol_archive_bulk`
- `protocol_curate`
- `protocol_curator_status`

### Mission scheduling

- `mission_schedule_create` ‚Äî Schedule a recurring mission. _e.g._ "every morning at 8, summarize my unread email"
- `mission_schedule_list` ‚Äî List scheduled missions.
- `mission_schedule_update`
- `mission_schedule_delete`
- `mission_schedule_toggle` ‚Äî Enable/disable a scheduled mission.

### Agents

- `agent_list` ‚Äî List available agents.
- `agent_spawn` ‚Äî Delegate work to a sub-agent. _e.g._ "spawn an agent to research X"
- `agent_create` ‚Äî Create a new named agent. _e.g._ "create a research agent named Scout"

### Project containers

- `project_create` ‚Äî Create a project container. _e.g._ "make a project for the dashboard work"
- `project_list` ‚Äî List projects.
- `project_add_agent` ‚Äî Add an agent to a project.
- `project_brief_read`
- `project_brief_update`
- `agent_status` ‚Äî Check a spawned agent's status.
- `agent_cancel` ‚Äî Cancel a spawned agent.
- `agent_output` ‚Äî Get a spawned agent's output.

### Browser

- `browser` ‚Äî Drive a real browser. _e.g._ "open google.com and search for X"

### Apps

- `build_app` ‚Äî Build a working app from a description. _e.g._ "build me a todo app"
- `app_create` ‚Äî Create a new app scaffold.
- `app_list` ‚Äî List your apps.

### Sidebar

- `sidebar_pin` ‚Äî Pin an item to the sidebar. _e.g._ "pin this to the sidebar"
- `sidebar_unpin` ‚Äî Unpin a sidebar item.
- `sidebar_clear` ‚Äî Clear the sidebar. _e.g._ "clear the sidebar"

### Auto-build orchestrator

- `primal_run_build_plan` ‚Äî Run a staged app-build plan.
- `primal_build_status` ‚Äî Check an app build's status.
- `primal_build_resume` ‚Äî Resume a paused app build.
- `start_app_build`
- `finalize_app_build`

### Secrets

- `request_secret` ‚Äî Securely request + store a secret. _e.g._ "I need to store my OpenAI key"
- `request_secrets` ‚Äî Request multiple secrets.
- `list_secrets` ‚Äî List stored secret names (never values).

### Document creation

- `document_create` ‚Äî Create a document. _e.g._ "write me a one-pager on X"
- `document_edit` ‚Äî Edit a document.
- `document_read` ‚Äî Read a document.

---
